trans-unit.source: Arguments passed to the resource command. Values are mapped to command argument inputs in order; use name=value for named values.
trans-unit.target: Arguments passed to the resource command. Values are mapped to command argument inputs in order; use name=value for named values.

trans-unit.source: Specify command arguments either as positional arguments or with --arguments, not both.
trans-unit.target: Specify command arguments either as positional arguments or with --arguments, not both.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for boolean command argument '{1}'. Expected true or false.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for boolean command argument '{1}'. Expected true or false.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for command argument '{1}'. Expected one of: {2}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for command argument '{1}'. Expected one of: {2}.

trans-unit.source: Invalid command argument '{0}'. Use name=value for named command arguments.
trans-unit.target: Invalid command argument '{0}'. Use name=value for named command arguments.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for numeric command argument '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for numeric command argument '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value for command argument '{0}'. Maximum length is {1}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value for command argument '{0}'. Maximum length is {1}.

trans-unit.source: Invalid command arguments JSON: expected a JSON object.
trans-unit.target: Invalid command arguments JSON: expected a JSON object.

trans-unit.source: Command '{0}' on resource '{1}' does not describe argument inputs. Pass a JSON object with --arguments.
trans-unit.target: Command '{0}' on resource '{1}' does not describe argument inputs. Pass a JSON object with --arguments.

trans-unit.source: JSON object containing invocation arguments to pass to the resource command
trans-unit.target: JSON object containing invocation arguments to pass to the resource command

trans-unit.source: Too many command arguments for '{0}'. Expected at most {1}: {2}.
trans-unit.target: Too many command arguments for '{0}'. Expected at most {1}: {2}.

trans-unit.source: Unknown command argument '{0}'. Expected one of: {1}.
trans-unit.target: Unknown command argument '{0}'. Expected one of: {1}.

trans-unit.source: Execute a command on a resource (e.g. start, stop, restart)
The name of the command to execute (e.g. start, stop, restart)
The name of the resource to execute the command on
trans-unit.target: Nazwa zasobu, na którym ma zostać wykonane polecenie.
